content: Backend: refactor pdf_generator into smaller builder helpers
Frontend: fix React hook missing deps (AuthContext, ThemeContext, Settings, DocumentEditor, RecurringEditor, Topbar)
Frontend: replace array-index-as-key with stable keys in line items
Frontend: add error logging in empty catch blocks
Frontend: extract DocumentEditor sub-components (DocumentMetadataCard, LineItemsCard, SummaryCard, SendEmailDialog)
Frontend: useMemo for expensive computation in Dashboard JSX
Add SECURITY.md note on token storage trade-off
